## Mission

State the exact customer-facing or repository result this change must produce.

## Exact scope

- Files or behavior changed:
- Files or behavior intentionally untouched:

## Protected website baseline

- [ ] Branding preserved
- [ ] Layout preserved unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] Wording preserved unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] Pricing and booking behavior preserved unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] Navigation and mobile behavior preserved unless explicitly authorized

## Proof

- [ ] Exact target inspected before editing
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] Static Site Gate passes
- [ ] Desktop result checked when visual files changed
- [ ] Mobile result checked when visual files changed
- [ ] Temporary files and verifier artifacts were removed
- [ ] No secrets or private customer information were committed

## Verdict

Use one: **Works / Works partially / Does not work / Unknown until verified**

## Remaining issue

State the exact blocker or write `None`.
